homepage.title: Rising Academies
homepage.description:
Rising Academies is one of the fastest-growing quality-focused education 
companies in Africa, and a Certified B Corp®. We constantly refine and 
improve our model in schools we own and operate ourselves, then take these 
solutions and partner with governments and other education providers to to 
improve the quality of their schools at scale.

  ARE

  Our mission is to create the world’s best schools and the most powerful teaching and learning tools for the people that need it most.

  

    
  
  
  

  
  
  
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
  
  By leveraging cutting-edge technologies, evidence-based approaches, and deep on-the-ground experience, we ensure that every child receives the education they deserve.

  

  
  Founded in Sierra Leone in 2014, we’ve spent over a decade crafting a unique blend of high-tech and low-tech learning solutions proven to dramatically improve student outcomes and elevate teaching quality at scale.Our innovative approach combines expertly designed curriculum materials, personalized learning experiences, intensive teacher coaching and actionable data for school leaders.Today, we serve more than a quarter of a million students across 1,000 schools in West and East Africa - and we’re just getting started. 

  

    
  
  
  

  
  
  
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
        

  
    
    
      HOW WE WORK
    
  

  
    

  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        Pioneering Great-Value Private Schools
      

      
        
          Our innovative networks of private schools deliver best-in-class results for children while developing highly scalable new technologies and approaches.
        
      

    
  

  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        Scalable Government Partnerships
      

      
        
          We partner and collaborate with local and national governments across Africa to transform the quality of public school systems at scale.
        
      

    
  

  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        High Impact Solutions for Partners
      

      
        
          We offer our proven high-impact solutions to other education providers and schools to improve school performance & increase outcomes.

  OUR SOLUTIONS

  

    
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      

  
  
  
    
      
        

        
        

        
          
            
              
          
          
          
          
          
          
          
          
            
          
          
        
            
          
        

      
      

    
  

  
  Proven solutions to help schools and systems thrive…

  

  
  We’ve built a suite of high-tech and low-tech solutions designed to help schools—and systems—deliver stronger student outcomes. Whether you’re supporting one school or one thousand, our solutions are built for impact, tested in real classrooms, and ready to deploy . Explore our solutions to learn how Rising can help you achieve your goal

  

    
  
  
  

  
  
  
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
        
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
        

  
    
    
      
    
  

  
    

  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        RisingFaster: Remedial Literacy & Numeracy
      

      
        
          RisingFaster is a high-impact foundational literacy & numeracy remedial program that uses a structured pedagogy approach. The program consists of two components, 'FasterReading' and 'FasterMath,' both of which have been shown to deliver significant cost-effective learning gains for students.
        
      

    
  

  
    

      
        Find out more
      

    
  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        Rori: AI-Powered Virtual Math Tutor
      

      
        
          Rori is a multi-award winning virtual math tutor, designed for upper primary and JHS students. Rori combines proven teaching methods and cutting-edge AI to deliver bite-sized lessons, practical exercises, and personalized feedback. Early research show that Rori can double math outcomes for students!
        
      

    
  

  
    

      
        Find out more
      

    
  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        Tari: AI-powered Teacher's Assistant
      

      
        
          Tari is an ai-powered support tool helping teachers meet their true potential. This low-cost and scalable solution, delivered via WhatsApp, provides educators with on-demand assistance, resources, and knowledge to help them prepare for lessons more effectively. Teachers absolutely love it!
        
      

    
  

  
    

      
        FIND OUT MORE
      

    
  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        Grade-Level Curriculum Materials: ECE & Primary English and Math
      

      
        
          We’ve built high-quality grade-level curriculum materials using Science of Learning principles for ECE 1-2 and Primary G1-6 in English and Math. Theses materials combine a structured pedagogy approach with country-aligned standards to ensure every child masters foundational skills. Designed for impact in real classrooms, the curriculum supports teachers with clear guidance and engaging, evidence-based content that drives measurable learning gains.
        
      

    
  

  
    

      
        Find out more
      

    
  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        LearnLens: AI Auto-Grading Solution
      

      
        
          LearnLens is an auto-grading solution that automates marking; significantly reducing the time spent on assessment marking. LearnLens leverages optical character recognition and AI technologies to streamline the processes of marking hand-written assessment and analyzing the learning trends end-to-end. This system provides valuable feedback to teachers, school leaders and government officials, assisting them in creating effective action plans. 
        
      

    
  

  
    

      
        Find out more
      

    
  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        
  
      
        

      
  

        

  
    

      
        Rising SIS: Student Information System

  OUR IMPACT

  

    
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      

  
  
  
    
      
        

        
        

        
          
            
              
          
          
          
          
          
          
          
          
            
          
          
        
            
          
        

      
      

    
  

  
  Transformational  Cost Effective Impact.“However well we do, we always strive to do better.”

  

  
  At Rising we are committed to the highest standards of rigour and transparency when it comes to assessing and sharing the impact of our work. Along with our own internal evaluation processes, led by our in-house Data and Research Team, we partner with world-class researchers to measure our impact and learn how we can improve and contribute to the global evidence base.  Some highlights of the impact of our work can be found below followed by access to all of our research studies. 

  

    
  
  
  

  
  
  
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
  
  Rising Impact Highlights

  

  
  7 RCTs have shown that our students learn, on average, 2.4x faster each year than their peers in comparable schools

  

  
  Rising Academies is a Certified B Corp and twice named in its “Best for the World” list

  

  
  Our AI-powered math chatbot tutor Rori has been proven to double math learning outcomes when used regularly

  

  
  Our learning impact ranks in the top 10% for all global education interventions

  

  
  We support more than 1000 schools and over 270,000 students

  

  
  90% of the students we serve are below the $2.15/day global poverty line

  

  
  Every school in our Sierra Leone network ranked in the Top 10 nationally in the most recent national exams

  

  
  Girls in Rising schools progress at 2x their peers

  

  
  Rising supports more than 700 public schools through 5 government partnerships 

  

    
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
  
  External Independent Evaluations

  

  
  Rigorous evaluations, conducted by world renowned, independent research partners.

  

    
  
  
  

  
    
    

  
  

  
    
    
      
    
    
  
  
    
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
      
        

  

  
    

  
    
    
      
      
      
        

        

  
    

      
        Oxford and J-PAL Researchers see strong early results for Rising’s AI tutor “Rori” (2023 - Ongoing)
      

      
        
          Researchers from the University of Oxford and J-PAL have conducted an early evaluation of our virtual math tutor “Rori”, showing very promising early results. The evaluation, conducted over 8 months, included 1,000 students in grades 3-9 across 11 schools in Ghana. The study found that students who received two 30-minute sessions with Rori, on top of their normal math lessons, had “markedly higher scores” in maths, with an effect size of 0.36 SD. Research on Rori is continuing and preparations are being made for a larger RCT study to take place in Academic Year 2025/26.RISING BLOG SUMMARY
        
      

    
  

  
    

      
        FULL RESEARCH PAPER
      

    
  

      
      
    
  
    
    
      
      
      
        

        

  
    

      
        Strongest overall performance in Year 2 of Sierra Leone’s Education Innovation Challenge  (2022 - Ongoing)
      

      
        
          The Sierra Leone Education Innovation Challenge is an education outcomes partnership designed by Education Outcomes Fund in partnership with the Ministry of Education of Sierra Leone. It is designed to increase literacy and numeracy outcomes over three years for 134,000 children across the country. Rising is one of five non-state actors to participate in the program. As part of the program, Rising implements its full education model in 66 schools in Tonkolili and Kono Districts. Schools are provided with teacher guides and students workbooks, covering the full Sierra Leonean English and Math curriculum; our foundational literacy and numeracy programs (Rising Faster), as well as teacher and school leader training and regular support in the form of weekly visits from our Rising Coaches.YEAR 1 REPORT
        
      

    
  

  
    

      
        YEAR 2 SUMMARY

  We work closely with leading education reformers, funders, partners and researchers.

  

  
  Our partnerships span government ministries, industry-leading philanthropists and world leading research organisations, all of whom share our commitment to delivering quality education to the people that need it most. These partnerships enable us to deliver the highest quality schools and education solutions to children across Sierra Leone, Ghana, Liberia, Rwanda and beyond.
